/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   世界书管理（契约 §10）
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */
function lorebookApi(){return TV&&TV.lorebook?TV.lorebook:null}

var REL_BOOK_MARKER='fs_relation_book_root';
var REL_BOOK_MARKER_TEXT='fifth_season_relation_book_v1';

var REL_ENTRY_NAME_TO_ID={
  '第五季果汁关系书标记':'fs_relation_book_root',
  '关系系统输出规则':'rel_rules',
  '关系自定义规则':'rel_custom',
  '关系阶段：初见':'rel_stage_初见',
  '关系阶段：相识':'rel_stage_相识',
  '关系阶段：熟悉':'rel_stage_熟悉',
  '关系阶段：牵连':'rel_stage_牵连',
  '关系阶段：深涉':'rel_stage_深涉',
  '关系阶段：核心':'rel_stage_核心'
};

var REL_CORE_IDS=[
  'fs_relation_book_root',
  'rel_rules',
  'rel_custom',
  'rel_stage_初见',
  'rel_stage_相识',
  'rel_stage_熟悉',
  'rel_stage_牵连',
  'rel_stage_深涉',
  'rel_stage_核心'
];

function relationBookName(state){
  return '第五季果汁关系世界书';
}

function entriesOf(book){
  if(!book||typeof book!=='object')return[];
  if(Array.isArray(book.entries))return book.entries;
  if(book.entries&&typeof book.entries==='object')return Object.keys(book.entries).map(function(k){return book.entries[k]}).filter(Boolean);
  if(Array.isArray(book.items))return book.items;
  return[];
}

function ensureBookEntriesArray(book){
  if(!book||typeof book!=='object')return book;
  if(Array.isArray(book.entries))return book;
  if(book.entries&&typeof book.entries==='object'){
    book.entries=Object.keys(book.entries).map(function(k){return book.entries[k]}).filter(Boolean);
  }else{
    book.entries=[];
  }
  return book;
}

function entryIdOf(e){
  if(!e||typeof e!=='object')return'';
  return trim(e.identifier||e.id||e.comment||e.name||'');
}

function entryNameOf(e){
  if(!e||typeof e!=='object')return'';
  return trim(e.name||e.comment||e.identifier||'');
}

function entryCanonicalKeys(e){
  var keys=[];
  var id=trim(e&&e.identifier||'');
  var name=entryNameOf(e);
  var comment=trim(e&&e.comment||'');
  if(id)keys.push(id);
  if(name)keys.push(name);
  if(comment)keys.push(comment);
  if(name&&REL_ENTRY_NAME_TO_ID[name])keys.push(REL_ENTRY_NAME_TO_ID[name]);
  if(comment&&REL_ENTRY_NAME_TO_ID[comment])keys.push(REL_ENTRY_NAME_TO_ID[comment]);
  var out={},arr=[];
  keys.forEach(function(k){k=trim(k);if(k&&!out[k]){out[k]=1;arr.push(k)}});
  return arr;
}

function isRelationBook(book){
  if(!book||typeof book!=='object')return false;
  var entries=entriesOf(book);
  if(!entries.length)return false;

  var hit=0;
  var marker=false;

  entries.forEach(function(e){
    if(!e)return;
    var keys=entryCanonicalKeys(e);
    var content=trim(e.content||'');
    if(keys.indexOf(REL_BOOK_MARKER)>=0)marker=true;
    if(content.indexOf(REL_BOOK_MARKER_TEXT)>=0)marker=true;
    keys.forEach(function(k){
      if(REL_CORE_IDS.indexOf(k)>=0)hit++;
    });
  });

  if(marker)return true;
  if(hit>=2)return true;

  var names=entries.map(function(e){return entryNameOf(e)}).join('|');
  if(names.indexOf('关系系统输出规则')>=0&&names.indexOf('关系自定义规则')>=0)return true;
  if(names.indexOf('关系阶段：初见')>=0&&names.indexOf('关系阶段：核心')>=0)return true;

  return false;
}

function wbCachePut(book){
  var map={};
  entriesOf(book).forEach(function(e){
    if(!e)return;
    entryCanonicalKeys(e).forEach(function(k){
      if(k)map[k]=e;
    });
  });
  app._relWorldbookCache={
    bookId:book&&book.id||null,
    name:book&&book.name||'',
    entries:map,
    updatedAt:now()
  };
  return app._relWorldbookCache;
}

function findEntryInBook(book,identifier){
  identifier=trim(identifier||'');
  var list=entriesOf(book);
  for(var i=0;i<list.length;i++){
    var e=list[i];
    var keys=entryCanonicalKeys(e);
    if(keys.indexOf(identifier)>=0)return e;
  }
  return null;
}

function findWBEntry(identifier){
  identifier=trim(identifier||'');
  var c=app._relWorldbookCache&&app._relWorldbookCache.entries||{};
  return c[identifier]||null;
}

function readWBContent(identifier){
  var e=findWBEntry(identifier);
  return e?trim(e.content||''):'';
}

function refIdOf(ref){
  if(ref==null)return null;
  if(typeof ref==='object'){
    if(ref.id!=null)return ref.id;
    if(ref.bookId!=null)return ref.bookId;
    if(ref.lorebookId!=null)return ref.lorebookId;
    if(ref.worldbookId!=null)return ref.worldbookId;
    return null;
  }
  return ref;
}

async function getCurrentChatBoundLorebookRefs(){
  var chat=await hostCall(function(){return TV.chat.current()},'chat.current.relation-lorebooks',12000,{silent:true,fallback:null});
  var refs=[];
  if(chat){
    refs=refs
      .concat(safeArr(chat.lorebooks))
      .concat(safeArr(chat.worldbooks))
      .concat(safeArr(chat.books));
  }
  return refs;
}

async function getRelationBook(state,createIfMissing){
  var lb=lorebookApi();
  if(!lb)throw new Error('当前宿主不支持世界书');

  state=state||load();
  var refs=await getCurrentChatBoundLorebookRefs();

  if(!refs.length){
    state.sync=state.sync||{};
    state.sync.worldbookReady=false;
    state.sync.lastWorldbookError='当前聊天没有绑定关系世界书';
    save(state);
    throw new Error('当前聊天没有绑定关系世界书。请先绑定“第五季果汁关系世界书”。');
  }

  var boundIds={};
  refs.forEach(function(ref){
    var id=refIdOf(ref);
    if(id!=null&&id!=='')boundIds[String(id)]=true;
  });

  if(state.sync&&state.sync.relationBookId&&boundIds[String(state.sync.relationBookId)]&&lb.get){
    try{
      var cached=await hostCall(function(){return lb.get(state.sync.relationBookId)},'lorebook.get.relation-bound',12000,{silent:true,fallback:null});
      if(cached&&isRelationBook(cached))return _bindBook(cached,state);
    }catch(_){}
  }

  for(var i=0;i<refs.length;i++){
    var ref=refs[i];
    var full=null;

    if(ref&&typeof ref==='object'&&entriesOf(ref).length){
      full=ref;
    }

    var id=refIdOf(ref);
    if(!full&&id!=null&&lb.get){
      try{
        full=await hostCall(function(){return lb.get(id)},'lorebook.get.chat-bound-'+id,12000,{silent:true,fallback:null});
      }catch(_2){}
    }

    if(full&&isRelationBook(full)){
      return _bindBook(full,state);
    }
  }

  state.sync=state.sync||{};
  state.sync.worldbookReady=false;
  state.sync.lastWorldbookError='当前聊天已绑定世界书，但没有检测到第五季关系书标记';
  save(state);
  throw new Error('没有检测到已绑定的“第五季果汁关系世界书”。请确认世界书包含 fs_relation_book_root 或 rel_rules。');
}

function _bindBook(book,state){
  state=state||load();
  state.sync=state.sync||{};
  state.sync.relationBookId=book&&book.id!=null?book.id:state.sync.relationBookId;
  state.sync.worldbookReady=true;
  state.sync.lastWorldbookError='';
  wbCachePut(book);
  save(state);
  return book;
}

async function updateRelationBook(book,state,reason){
  var lb=lorebookApi();
  if(!lb)throw new Error('当前宿主不支持世界书');
  if(!book||book.id==null)throw new Error('关系世界书没有可更新的运行时 ID');

  ensureBookEntriesArray(book);

  await hostCall(function(){return lb.update(book)},'lorebook.update.relation-bound',20000);

  wbCachePut(book);
  state=state||load();
  state.sync=state.sync||{};
  state.sync.worldbookReady=true;
  state.sync.lastWorldbookSyncAt=now();
  state.sync.lastWorldbookError='';
  state.sync.dirtyReasons=[];
  if(reason)addLog(state,'system','关系世界书已更新: '+reason);
  save(state);
  return book;
}

function entryBase(identifier,name,content,opts){
  opts=opts||{};
  return{
    identifier:String(identifier||''),
    name:String(name||identifier||'关系条目'),
    content:String(content||''),
    enabled:opts.enabled!==false,
    strategy:opts.constant===false?'keyword':'constant',
    keywords:safeArr(opts.keywords),
    secondaryKeywords:[],
    secondaryKeywordStrategy:'none',
    scanDepth:2,
    caseSensitive:false,
    matchWholeWord:false,
    injectionPosition:opts.injectionPosition||'lorebookBefore',
    injectionDepth:Number(opts.injectionDepth||4)||4,
    injectionRole:'system',
    probability:100,
    sticky:0,
    cooldown:0,
    delay:0
  };
}

async function upsertWBEntry(identifier,content,opts){
  opts=opts||{};
  var state=load();
  var book=await getRelationBook(state,false);
  ensureBookEntriesArray(book);

  var e=findEntryInBook(book,identifier);
  if(e){
    e.content=String(content||'');
    e.name=opts.name||e.name||identifier;
    if(opts.enabled!=null)e.enabled=opts.enabled!==false;
    if(opts.constant!=null)e.strategy=opts.constant===false?'keyword':'constant';
  }else{
    book.entries.push(entryBase(identifier,opts.name||identifier,content,opts));
  }

  await updateRelationBook(book,state,identifier);
  return true;
}

async function ensureWBEntries(state){
  state=state||load();
  var book=await getRelationBook(state,false);
  wbCachePut(book);
  state.sync=state.sync||{};
  state.sync.worldbookReady=true;
  state.sync.lastWorldbookError='';
  save(state);
  return [];
}

async function refreshWBCache(state){
  try{
    await getRelationBook(state||load(),false);
  }catch(e){
    try{
      var s=state||load();
      s.sync=s.sync||{};
      s.sync.worldbookReady=false;
      s.sync.lastWorldbookError=String(e&&e.message||e);
      save(s);
    }catch(_){}
  }
}

async function syncProfileWB(charId,charName,summaryText){
  return;
}

function readStageGuide(stage){
  stage=trim(stage||'');
  var text=readWBContent('rel_stage_'+stage);
  return trim(text||buildStageContent(stage)||'');
}

function readCustomRules(){return readWBContent('rel_custom')}

function buildRulesContent(){
  return [
    '【关系系统输出规则】',
    '你必须在每次回复末尾输出一个 <RELATION>...</RELATION> 机器块。',
    '格式：',
    '<RELATION>',
    '{"events":[{"type":"事件类型","target":"角色名","evidence":"具体证据","note":""}],"pressureReports":[],"unresolved":[]}',
    '</RELATION>',
    '',
    '【事件类型列表】',
    '信任: trust_gain, trust_test, trust_breach, trust_doubt',
    '情感: affection_grow, affection_fade, affection_reject',
    '尊重: respect_gain, respect_loss',
    '忠诚: loyalty_pledge, loyalty_waver, loyalty_betray',
    '依赖: depend_deepen, depend_break',
    '冲突: tension_rise, conflict_erupt, conflict_resolve, hostility_show',
    '隐瞒: secret_keep, secret_reveal, deception_act, deception_expose, guilt_surface',
    '边界: boundary_open, boundary_set, boundary_violate',
    '权力: power_yield, power_assert, power_resist',
    '第三方: rival_appear, jealousy_trigger, alliance_form',
    '节点: milestone_positive, milestone_negative',
    '场景: scene_presence',
    '',
    '【规则】',
    '- 每轮最多 2 条事件（多人场景每角色最多 1 条，全局最多 3 条）',
    '- 必须提供 evidence（从本轮对话摘取的具体行为或对话，最长 200 字符）',
    '- 无关系变化时输出空事件列表',
    '- pressureReports 可选，只接受 result: "released"',
    '- 不确定的事件放入 unresolved'
  ].join('\n');
}
function buildStageContent(stg){
  var m={
    '初见':'【初见阶段演绎指引】\n双方刚刚接触，一切都是表面的。角色保持社交礼貌或冷淡距离。对话围绕基本信息交换，不涉及深层情感。角色不会轻易表露内心，玩家的好意会被礼貌接受但不会得到深层回应。',
    '相识':'【相识阶段演绎指引】\n双方开始有了初步了解。角色会记住之前的互动，偶尔流露真实想法。开始建立基础信任或产生初步戒备。对话中可以出现轻微的试探和边界确认。',
    '熟悉':'【熟悉阶段演绎指引】\n关系进入稳定期。角色在玩家面前有相对固定的态度和行为模式。可以有分歧和小冲突，但通常能自然化解。角色会主动分享一些个人想法，也会关注玩家的状态。',
    '牵连':'【牵连阶段演绎指引】\n关系已经深度卷入，双方的行为会显著影响对方。角色对玩家的态度变化非常敏感，冲突会带来明显的情绪波动。开始出现依赖、控制、嫉妒等复杂情感。',
    '深涉':'【深涉阶段演绎指引】\n高度依存的关系。角色对玩家有强烈的情感需求或义务感。背叛和忠诚在这个阶段分量极重。角色可能为了这段关系做出超出常规的选择。',
    '核心':'【核心阶段演绎指引】\n极深羁绊。角色与玩家之间的关系已经成为角色身份认同的一部分。任何变化都会产生深远影响。这种关系可以是极度信任，也可以是极度对立，但绝不是淡漠的。'
  };
  return m[stg]||'【'+stg+'阶段演绎指引】\n（请编写该阶段的演绎指引文案。）';
}
function buildStageMapContent(){
  return STAGES.map(function(stg){
    return '【'+stg+'】\n'+buildStageContent(stg);
  }).join('\n\n');
}

function parseStageMapContent(raw){
  raw=String(raw||'');
  var out={};
  STAGES.forEach(function(stg,idx){
    var marker='【'+stg+'】';
    var start=raw.indexOf(marker);
    if(start<0)return;
    start+=marker.length;
    var end=raw.length;
    for(var j=0;j<STAGES.length;j++){
      if(j===idx)continue;
      var mk='【'+STAGES[j]+'】';
      var p=raw.indexOf(mk,start);
      if(p>=0&&p<end)end=p;
    }
    var txt=trim(raw.slice(start,end));
    if(txt)out[stg]=txt;
  });
  return out;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   机器块解析（契约 §1）
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

function extractBlock(text){
  var m=String(text||'').match(/<RELATION>([\s\S]*?)<\/RELATION>/);
  return m?trim(m[1]):null;
}
function removeBlocks(text){
  return String(text||'').replace(/<RELATION>[\s\S]*?<\/RELATION>/g,'').replace(/<RELFB>[\s\S]*?<\/RELFB>/g,'').trim();
}

function messageContentOf(msg){
  return String(typeof msg==='string'?msg:(msg&&(msg.content!=null?msg.content:msg.text)||''));
}
function messageIdOf(msg){
  if(!msg||typeof msg!=='object')return'';
  if(msg.id!=null)return String(msg.id);
  if(msg.messageId!=null)return String(msg.messageId);
  if(msg.message_id!=null)return String(msg.message_id);
  if(msg.uid!=null)return String(msg.uid);
  if(msg.uuid!=null)return String(msg.uuid);
  return'';
}
function messageSig(text){
  text=String(text||'');
  return hashSmall(text.slice(0,500)+'|'+text.length);
}
function rememberFeedback(state,msgId,floorL,result){
  state=normState(state||load());
  state.turnState=state.turnState||{lastSummary:null,processedMessages:{},feedbackByMessage:{},feedbackByFloor:{},feedbackOrder:[],noChangeStreak:0,currentTurn:0};
  var key=msgId?String(msgId):('round_'+String(result&&result.round||state.meta.round||now()));
  var item=Object.assign({},result||{});
  item.messageId=key;
  item.floorL=Number(floorL)||0;
  item.storedAt=now();
  /* ── 主路径：messageId → feedbackByMessage ── */
  state.turnState.feedbackByMessage[key]=item;
  var mkeys=Object.keys(state.turnState.feedbackByMessage);
  if(mkeys.length>120)mkeys.slice(0,mkeys.length-100).forEach(function(k){delete state.turnState.feedbackByMessage[k]});
  /* ── 次级索引：floorL → feedbackByFloor ── */
  if(item.floorL){
    state.turnState.feedbackByFloor[String(item.floorL)]=item;
    var fkeys=Object.keys(state.turnState.feedbackByFloor);
    if(fkeys.length>120)fkeys.slice(0,fkeys.length-100).forEach(function(k){delete state.turnState.feedbackByFloor[k]});
  }
  /* ── 顺序记录：feedbackOrder ── */
  var ord=state.turnState.feedbackOrder;
  /* 移除同 messageId 的旧记录 */
  for(var oi=ord.length-1;oi>=0;oi--){if(ord[oi]&&String(ord[oi].messageId||'')===key){ord.splice(oi,1)}}
  ord.push({messageId:key,floorL:item.floorL,round:Number(item.round||0)||0,storedAt:item.storedAt});
  if(ord.length>120)ord.splice(0,ord.length-100);
  /* lastSummary 只作为极弱兜底 */
  state.turnState.lastSummary=item;
  state.turnState.currentTurn=boundedInt(Number(state.turnState.currentTurn||0)+1,0,999999,0);
  save(state);
  try{if(app.feedback&&app.feedback.storeRoundResult)app.feedback.storeRoundResult(key,item.floorL,item)}catch(_){}
  try{
    var mark=T.__FIFTH_SEASON_MARK__||window.__FIFTH_SEASON_MARK__;
    if(mark&&mark.scheduleRefresh)mark.scheduleRefresh(80,'light');
    else if(mark&&mark.refresh)mark.refresh(false);
  }catch(_){}
  return state;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   消息绑定确认 — 第一批新增
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */
async function resolveMessageBinding(msg,result){
  var mid='';
  var floorL=0;
  /* 1) 优先使用 msg 对象的 id */
  if(msg&&typeof msg==='object'){
    mid=messageIdOf(msg);
  }
  /* 2) 如果 msg 本身 id 不稳定，从最新 assistant 消息列表确认 */
  if(!mid){
    try{
      if(TV&&TV.message&&TV.message.find){
        var count=await TV.message.count();
        if(count>0){
          var found=await TV.message.find(-1,{role:'assistant'});
          if(Array.isArray(found)&&found[0])mid=messageIdOf(found[0]);
        }
      }
    }catch(_){}
  }
  /* 3) 计算真实 floorL（assistant 楼层） */
  if(mid){
    try{
      if(TV&&TV.message&&TV.message.find&&TV.message.count){
        var total=await TV.message.count();
        var all=total>0?await TV.message.find([0,total-1]):[];
        var aFloor=0;
        for(var ai=0;ai<all.length;ai++){
          var m=all[ai];
          if(!m)continue;
          var role=String(m.role||m.sender||'').toLowerCase();
          if(role.indexOf('assistant')>=0||role.indexOf('character')>=0||role.indexOf('char')>=0||role==='bot'){
            aFloor++;
            if(String(m.id||m.messageId||m.message_id||'')===String(mid)){
              floorL=aFloor;
              break;
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }catch(_){}
  }
  /* 4) fallback: 如果拿不到 floorL，用 result.round 作为弱兜底 */
  if(!floorL&&result){
    floorL=Number(result.round)||0;
  }
  addLog(load(),'system','消息绑定: messageId='+mid+' floorL='+floorL);
  save(load());
  return{messageId:mid,floorL:floorL};
}
function sanitizeRelFbResult(result){
  result=result||{};
  var out={
    schema:'relfb-v1',
    parsed:!!result.parsed,
    error:trim(result.error||''),
    round:Number(result.round||0)||0,
    evCount:Number(result.evCount||0)||0,
    messageId:trim(result.messageId||''),
    floorL:Number(result.floorL||0)||0,
    results:[]
  };

  out.results=safeArr(result.results).map(function(r){
    r=r||{};
    var ev=r.event||{};
    var sr=r.sr||{};
    return{
      ok:!!r.ok,
      reason:trim(r.reason||''),
      charId:trim(r.charId||''),
      charName:trim(r.charName||''),
      event:{
        type:trim(ev.type||''),
        target:trim(ev.target||''),
        evidence:clip(trim(ev.evidence||''),220),
        note:trim(ev.note||'')
      },
      sr:{
        base:Number(sr.base||0)||0,
        pfMod:Number(sr.pfMod||0)||0,
        tagMod:Number(sr.tagMod||0)||0,
        calMod:Number(sr.calMod||0)||0,
        rptDecay:Number(sr.rptDecay||1)||1,
        sMult:Number(sr.sMult||1)||1,
        finalD:Number(sr.finalD||0)||0,
        depthD:Number(sr.depthD||0)||0,
        stage:trim(sr.stage||'')
      },
      tagChanges:safeArr(r.tagChanges).map(function(t){
        return{tag:trim(t.tag||''),from:Number(t.from||0)||0,to:Number(t.to||0)||0,act:trim(t.act||'')};
      })
    };
  });

  return out;
}

function encodeRelFbPayload(payload){
  try{return encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(payload||{}))}
  catch(_){return encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify({schema:'relfb-v1',parsed:false,error:'encode_fail',results:[]}))}
}

async function cleanVisibleMachineBlock(msg,text,result){
  if(!TV||!TV.message||!TV.message.update)return false;
  if(!extractBlock(text)&&!/<RELFB>[\s\S]*?<\/RELFB>/.test(String(text||'')))return false;

  var cleaned=removeBlocks(text);

  var target=msg&&typeof msg==='object'?Object.assign({},msg):null;

  try{
    if(!target||!messageIdOf(target)){
      var found=TV.message.find?await hostCall(function(){return TV.message.find(-1,{role:'assistant'})},'message.find.relation.clean',5000,{silent:true,fallback:null}):null;
      if(Array.isArray(found))target=found[0]||null;
      else if(found&&typeof found==='object')target=found;
    }

    if(!target||!messageIdOf(target))return false;

    target.content=trim(cleaned);
    await hostCall(function(){return TV.message.update(target)},'message.update.relation.clean',8000,{silent:true,fallback:null});
    return true;
  }catch(e){
    try{
      var s=load();
      addLog(s,'system','机器块清理失败: '+String(e&&e.message||e));
      save(s);
    }catch(_){}
    return false;
  }
}

function openFeedbackCapsule(msgId,floorL){
  var state=load();
  state.ui=state.ui&&typeof state.ui==='object'?state.ui:{};
  state.turnState=state.turnState||{processedMessages:{},feedbackByMessage:{},feedbackByFloor:{},feedbackOrder:[]};
  var item=null;
  if(msgId&&state.turnState.feedbackByMessage)item=state.turnState.feedbackByMessage[String(msgId)]||null;
  if(!item&&floorL&&state.turnState.feedbackByFloor)item=state.turnState.feedbackByFloor[String(floorL)]||null;
  var first=null;
  safeArr(item&&item.results).some(function(r){
    if(r&&r.charId){first=r;return true}
    return false;
  });
  state.ui.page='correction';
  state.ui.correctionTab='manual';
  state.ui.pageState={floorL:Number(floorL||item&&item.floorL||0)||0,messageId:trim(msgId||item&&item.messageId||''),fromCapsule:true};
  if(first&&first.charId)state.ui.focusCharId=first.charId;
  save(state);
  try{openPanel()}catch(_){}
  try{if(app.ui&&app.ui.renderAll)app.ui.renderAll(true)}catch(_){}
  if(item&&item.parsed)relToast(safeArr(item.results).some(function(r){return r&&r.ok})?'已打开本楼关系反馈':'本楼没有关系变化');
  else relToast('本楼暂无关系反馈');
  return true;
}

function parseBlock(raw){
  try{
    var obj=JSON.parse(raw);
    return{
      events:safeArr(obj.events).slice(0,5).map(function(e){
        if(!e||typeof e!=='object')return null;
        var tp=trim(e.type||'');
        if(ALL_EVENTS.indexOf(tp)<0)return null;
        return{type:tp,target:trim(e.target||''),evidence:clip(trim(e.evidence||''),200),note:trim(e.note||'')};
      }).filter(Boolean),
      pressureReports:safeArr(obj.pressureReports).filter(function(p){return p&&trim(p.id)&&trim(p.result)==='released'}),
      unresolved:safeArr(obj.unresolved)
    };
  }catch(_){return null}
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   目标匹配
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

function resolveTarget(targetText,state){
  state=state||load();
  targetText=trim(targetText);

  var active=safeArr(state.roster&&state.roster.activeOrder).map(trim).filter(Boolean).slice(0,5);
  var chars=state.roster&&state.roster.characters||{};

  function make(cid,matchedBy,raw){
    var rc=chars[cid]||{};
    var cs=loadCS(cid);
    return{
      charId:cid,
      charName:cs&&cs.charName||rc.name||rc.displayName||cid,
      matchedBy:matchedBy||'',
      rawTarget:raw||targetText
    };
  }

  if(!active.length)return null;

  if(!targetText&&active.length===1){
    return make(active[0],'single_empty_fallback','');
  }

  function candidateKeys(cid){
    var rc=chars[cid]||{};
    var cs=loadCS(cid)||{};
    var arr=[
      cid,
      rc.name,
      rc.displayName,
      cs.charName
    ]
    .concat(safeArr(rc.aliases))
    .concat(safeArr(cs.aliases));

    var out=[];
    var seen={};
    arr.forEach(function(x){
      x=trim(x);
      if(!x)return;
      var sx=sig(x);
      if(!sx)return;
      if(!seen[sx]){
        seen[sx]=1;
        out.push({raw:x,sig:sx});
      }
    });
    return out;
  }

  var ts=sig(targetText);
  if(!ts){
    if(active.length===1)return make(active[0],'single_empty_fallback',targetText);
    return null;
  }

  var exact=[];
  var partial=[];

  active.forEach(function(cid){
    var keys=candidateKeys(cid);

    keys.forEach(function(k){
      if(k.sig===ts){
        exact.push(cid);
        return;
      }

      if(ts.length>=2&&k.sig.length>=2){
        if(k.sig.indexOf(ts)>=0||ts.indexOf(k.sig)>=0){
          partial.push(cid);
        }
      }
    });
  });

  function unique(a){
    var m={},out=[];
    a.forEach(function(x){
      if(x&&!m[x]){
        m[x]=1;
        out.push(x);
      }
    });
    return out;
  }

  exact=unique(exact);
  partial=unique(partial);

  if(exact.length===1)return make(exact[0],'exact',targetText);
  if(exact.length>1)return null;

  if(partial.length===1)return make(partial[0],'partial',targetText);
  if(partial.length>1)return null;

  if(active.length===1){
    return make(active[0],'single_unknown_fallback',targetText);
  }

  return null;
}


/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   结算核心（契约 §5）
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

function tagStrMap(tags){
  var m={};TAG_LIST.forEach(function(t){m[t]=tags[t]?tags[t].str:0});return m;
}

function calcTagEff(tags,evType){
  var total=0;
  for(var i=0;i<TAG_EFFECTS.length;i++){
    var r=TAG_EFFECTS[i];
    if(r.events.indexOf(evType)<0)continue;
    var td=tags[r.tag];
    if(!td||td.str<r.min)continue;
    total+=r.mod;
  }
  return clamp(total,-3,3);
}

function calcProfileDelta(profile,evType){
  var total=0;
  PROFILE_DIMS.forEach(function(dim){
    var val=profile[dim]||'普通';
    var rules=PROFILE_RULES[dim];
    if(!rules||!rules[val])return;
    var dm=rules[val].delta||{};
    if(dm[evType])total+=dm[evType];
  });
  return clamp(total,-3,3);
}

function profileTagSpd(profile,tagName){
  var total=0;
  PROFILE_DIMS.forEach(function(dim){
    var val=profile[dim]||'普通';
    var rules=PROFILE_RULES[dim];
    if(!rules||!rules[val])return;
    var sp=rules[val].tagSpd||{};
    if(sp[tagName])total+=sp[tagName];
  });
  return total;
}

function profileExtra(profile,key){
  var result=null;
  PROFILE_DIMS.forEach(function(dim){
    var val=profile[dim]||'普通';
    var rules=PROFILE_RULES[dim];
    if(!rules||!rules[val])return;
    var ex=rules[val].extra;
    if(ex&&ex[key]!=null)result=ex[key];
  });
  return result;
}

function calcAutoCal(cal,dir){
  if(!cal)return 0;
  if(cal.streak>=5&&cal.lastDir===dir)return dir==='positive'?-2:2;
  if(cal.streak>=3&&cal.lastDir===dir)return dir==='positive'?-1:1;
  return 0;
}

function updateCal(cal,dir){
  if(!cal)cal={streak:0,lastDir:'',autoMod:0};
  if(dir===cal.lastDir){cal.streak=Math.min(cal.streak+1,20)}
  else{cal.streak=1;cal.lastDir=dir}
  if(cal.streak>=5)cal.autoMod=cal.lastDir==='positive'?-2:2;
  else if(cal.streak>=3)cal.autoMod=cal.lastDir==='positive'?-1:1;
  else cal.autoMod=0;
  return cal;
}

function calcRepeatDecay(cs,evType){
  var dir=eventDir(evType);
  if(dir==='negative')return 1;
  var cnt=Number(cs.repeatTrack[evType])||0;
  if(cnt<=1)return 1;
  if(cnt===2)return 0.8;
  if(cnt===3)return 0.6;
  return 0.5;
}

function bumpRepeat(cs,evType){
  cs.repeatTrack=cs.repeatTrack||{};
  cs.repeatTrack[evType]=(Number(cs.repeatTrack[evType])||0)+1;
  Object.keys(cs.repeatTrack).forEach(function(t){
    if(t!==evType){
      cs.repeatTrack[t]=Math.max(0,(cs.repeatTrack[t]||0)-1);
      if(cs.repeatTrack[t]<=0)delete cs.repeatTrack[t];
    }
  });
}

function applyGlobalCalibration(state,evType,result){
  var ac=state.autoCalibration||{};
  var eb=ac.eventBlock||{};
  if(eb[evType]==='block'){result.ok=false;result.reason='event_blocked';return result}
  var da=ac.deltaAdjustment||{};
  if(da[evType]!=null){var adj=Number(da[evType])||0;result.finalD=clamp(result.finalD+adj,-18,18)}
  var tb=ac.tagBlock||{};
  if(tb[evType]){result.tagMod=0}
  return result;
}

function settle(ev,cs,profile,round,state){
  var type=ev.type;var stage=cs.stage;
  var si=STAGE_IDX[stage]!=null?STAGE_IDX[stage]:0;

  var r={type:type,target:ev.target,evidence:ev.evidence,stage:stage,
    base:0,pfMod:0,tagMod:0,calMod:0,rptDecay:1,sfilt:'normal',sMult:1,
    rawD:0,finalD:0,depthD:0,ok:true,reason:''};

  var arr=BASE_DELTA[type];
  if(!arr){r.ok=false;r.reason='event_invalid';return r}

  r.base=arr[si]||0;
  r.pfMod=calcProfileDelta(profile,type);
  r.tagMod=calcTagEff(cs.tags,type);
  r.sfilt=stageFilter(stage,type);

  if(r.sfilt==='unlikely'){r.ok=false;r.reason='stage_unlikely';return r}
  if(r.sfilt==='caution')r.sMult=0.5;

  var dir=eventDir(type);
  r.calMod=clamp(calcAutoCal(cs.cal,dir),-2,2);
  r.rptDecay=calcRepeatDecay(cs,type);

  var delta=r.base+r.pfMod+r.tagMod+r.calMod;
  delta=delta*r.rptDecay*r.sMult;
  r.rawD=delta;
  r.finalD=clamp(Math.round(delta),-18,18);

  var bw=depthWeight(type);
  r.depthD=bw>0?Math.max(1,Math.round(bw*Math.max(0.25,1-cs.depth/150))):0;

  if(state)applyGlobalCalibration(state,type,r);

  return r;
}

function applySettle(cs,r,round){
  if(!r.ok)return;
  cs.value=clamp(cs.value+r.finalD,-100,100);
  cs.depth=clamp(cs.depth+r.depthD,0,100);
  var oldStg=cs.stage;
  cs.stage=depthToStage(cs.depth);
  cs.lastSettleRound=round;cs.roundsIdle=0;
  bumpRepeat(cs,r.type);
  updateCal(cs.cal,eventDir(r.type));

  addCLog(cs,'settle',
    (EVENT_LABEL[r.type]||r.type)+' → 关系值'+(r.finalD>=0?'+':'')+r.finalD+
    '(基准'+r.base+' 画像'+r.pfMod+' 标签'+r.tagMod+' 校准'+r.calMod+') 深度+'+r.depthD,
    {result:r}
  );
  if(cs.stage!==oldStg)addCLog(cs,'stage','阶段变化: '+oldStg+' → '+cs.stage);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   标签更新
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

function updateTags(cs,evType,profile,round){
  var mapping=TAG_MAP[evType];if(!mapping)return[];
  var tags=cs.tags;var changes=[];

  safeArr(mapping.gain).forEach(function(tn){
    var t=tags[tn];if(!t)return;
    var amt=1+Math.max(0,profileTagSpd(profile,tn));
    var old=t.str;
    t.str=clamp(t.str+amt,0,5);t.lastGain=round;
    if(t.str!==old)changes.push({tag:tn,from:old,to:t.str,act:'gain'});
  });

  safeArr(mapping.decay).forEach(function(tn){
    var t=tags[tn];if(!t||t.str<=0)return;
    var amt=1;
    if(evType==='conflict_resolve'){
      var bonus=profileExtra(profile,'resolveDecayBonus');
      amt=bonus?2+Math.abs(bonus):2;
    }
    var old=t.str;t.str=clamp(t.str-amt,0,5);
    if(t.str!==old)changes.push({tag:tn,from:old,to:t.str,act:'decay'});
  });

  if(changes.length)addCLog(cs,'tag',changes.map(function(c){return c.tag+' '+c.from+'→'+c.to}).join(', '));
  return changes;
}

function naturalDecay(cs,round){
  return [];
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   关系动力
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

function runAutoDyn(cs,dyn,round){
  var tm=tagStrMap(cs.tags);
  var stage=cs.stage;
  var mod=STAGE_DYN_MOD[stage]||{iMod:1,vMod:0};
  var triggered=[];

  AUTO_DYNAMICS.forEach(function(d){
    if(!d.cond(tm))return;
    var ds=dyn.auto[d.id]||{lastRound:0,count:0};
    var effInterval=Math.max(1,Math.round(d.interval*mod.iMod));
    if(round-ds.lastRound<effInterval)return;

    var effVD=d.vd;
    if(effVD!==0)effVD=effVD>0?effVD+mod.vMod:effVD-mod.vMod;

    cs.value=clamp(cs.value+effVD,-100,100);
    cs.depth=clamp(cs.depth+d.dd,0,100);
    var oldStg=cs.stage;cs.stage=depthToStage(cs.depth);
    ds.lastRound=round;ds.count=(ds.count||0)+1;
    dyn.auto[d.id]=ds;

    addCLog(cs,'dynamic','动力触发: '+d.label+' 关系值'+(effVD>=0?'+':'')+effVD+' 深度+'+d.dd);
    if(cs.stage!==oldStg)addCLog(cs,'stage','阶段变化: '+oldStg+' → '+cs.stage);
    triggered.push({id:d.id,label:d.label,vd:effVD,dd:d.dd});
  });
  return triggered;
}

function checkPromptDyn(cs,dyn,round){
  var tm=tagStrMap(cs.tags);var active=[];
  dyn.prompt=dyn.prompt&&typeof dyn.prompt==='object'?dyn.prompt:{};
  PROMPT_DYNAMICS.forEach(function(d){
    var ds=dyn.prompt[d.id]||{lastHintedTurn:0,activeTurn:0,lastActiveTurn:0};
    if(!d.cond(tm)){ds.activeTurn=0;dyn.prompt[d.id]=ds;return}
    ds.lastActiveTurn=round;
    if(round-Number(ds.lastHintedTurn||0)<d.cd){dyn.prompt[d.id]=ds;return}
    ds.lastHintedTurn=round;ds.activeTurn=round;dyn.prompt[d.id]=ds;
    active.push({id:d.id,label:d.label});
  });
  return active;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   crossLinks 传导
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

function runCrossLinks(cs,evType,state,round){
  var dir=eventDir(evType);if(dir==='neutral')return[];
  state=state&&typeof state==='object'?state:{};
  var sourceCid=trim(typeof cs==='string'?cs:(cs&&cs.charId||cs&&cs.id||''));
  if(!sourceCid)return[];
  var sourceCs=typeof cs==='string'?loadCS(sourceCid):(cs&&cs.charId?cs:loadCS(sourceCid));
  var changes=[];
  var used=arguments[4]&&typeof arguments[4]==='object'?arguments[4]:{};
  var present=safeArr(state.scene&&state.scene.present);
  safeArr(state.crossLinks).forEach(function(lk){
    if(!lk||!lk.type)return;
    var observerCid=trim(lk.from||lk.fromCharId||'');
    var targetCid=trim(lk.to||lk.toCharId||lk.targetCharId||'');
    if(!observerCid||targetCid!==sourceCid)return;
    if(present.length&&present.indexOf(observerCid)<0)return;
    var onceKey=[round,observerCid,targetCid,lk.type].join('|');
    if(used[onceKey])return;
    var def=CROSSLINK_TYPES[lk.type];if(!def)return;
    var tagName='';var amt=0;
    if(dir==='positive'&&def.posTag){tagName=def.posTag;amt=Number(def.posAmt||1)||1}
    else if(dir==='negative'&&def.negTag){tagName=def.negTag;amt=Number(def.negAmt||1)||1}
    if(!tagName||!amt)return;
    var obs=loadCS(observerCid);if(!obs||!obs.tags||!obs.tags[tagName])return;
    var tag=obs.tags[tagName];
    var old=Number(tag.str||0)||0;
    var next=clamp(old+amt,0,5);
    used[onceKey]=true;
    if(next===old)return;
    tag.str=next;tag.lastGain=round;
    addCLog(obs,'crosslink',(sourceCs&&sourceCs.charName||sourceCid)+' 的 '+(EVENT_LABEL[evType]||evType)+' 通过 '+(def.label||lk.type)+' 传导 → '+tagName+' '+old+'→'+next);
    addLog(state,'crosslink',(obs.charName||observerCid)+'：因'+(def.label||lk.type)+'传导获得'+tagName+'+'+amt,{charId:observerCid,turn:round,sourceCharId:sourceCid,targetCharId:targetCid,linkType:lk.type,tag:tagName,from:old,to:next});
    saveCS(observerCid,obs);
    changes.push({observerCharId:observerCid,targetCharId:targetCid,linkType:lk.type,tag:tagName,from:old,to:next,triggerEvent:evType});
  });
  return changes;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   pressureReports
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

function processPR(reports,cs,dyn){
  safeArr(reports).forEach(function(rpt){
    var did=trim(rpt.id);if(!did)return;
    if(dyn.auto[did]){dyn.auto[did].lastRound=0;addCLog(cs,'dynamic','动力释放: '+did)}
  });
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   每轮处理入口
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

function processMessage(msgText,state){
  var round=(state.meta.round||0)+1;
  state.meta.round=round;
  var activeList=safeArr(state.roster&&state.roster.activeOrder);

  /* ── 处理 scene_presence 事件（先于结算） ── */
  var raw=extractBlock(msgText);
  if(raw){
    var preParsed=parseBlock(raw);
    if(preParsed&&preParsed.events.length){
      preParsed.events.forEach(function(ev){
        if(ev.type==='scene_presence'){
          var tgt=resolveTarget(ev.target,state);
          var evid=trim(ev.evidence||'');
          if(tgt){
            var cid=tgt.charId;
            if(evid&&/进|来|到|出现/.test(evid)){
              if(state.scene.present.indexOf(cid)<0)state.scene.present.push(cid);
            }else if(evid&&/离|走|退|不在/.test(evid)){
              state.scene.present=state.scene.present.filter(function(c){return c!==cid});
            }
          }
        }
      });
      state.scene.lastUpdatedTurn=round;
    }
  }

  if(!raw){
    activeList.forEach(function(cid){
      var cs=loadCS(cid);if(!cs)return;
      cs.roundsIdle=(cs.roundsIdle||0)+1;
      var pf=ensurePF(cid);naturalDecay(cs,round);
      var dy=ensureDY(cid);runAutoDyn(cs,dy,round);
      saveDY(cid,dy);saveCS(cid,cs);
    });
    save(state);
    return{parsed:false,results:[],round:round};
  }

  var parsed=parseBlock(raw);
  if(!parsed){
    addLog(state,'protocol','机器块解析失败');
    save(state);
    return{parsed:false,error:'PARSE_FAIL',results:[],round:round};
  }

  addLog(state,'protocol','机器块解析成功: '+parsed.events.length+' 条事件');
  var results=[];var settledSet={};var crosslinkUsed={};

  parsed.events.forEach(function(ev){
    if(ev.type==='scene_presence')return; /* 已在上面处理 */
    var tgt=resolveTarget(ev.target,state);
    if(!tgt){
      state.pending.push({target:ev.target,type:ev.type,evidence:ev.evidence,reason:'target_unknown',round:round,ts:now()});
      addLog(state,'protocol','目标无法识别: '+ev.target);
      results.push({event:ev,ok:false,reason:'target_unknown'});
      return;
    }
    var cid=tgt.charId;
    var cs=ensureCS(cid,tgt.charName);
    var pf=ensurePF(cid);

    var sr=settle(ev,cs,pf,round,state);
    if(!sr.ok){
      if(sr.reason==='stage_unlikely'){
        state.pending.push({target:ev.target,type:ev.type,evidence:ev.evidence,reason:'stage_unlikely',round:round,ts:now()});
        addLog(state,'protocol','阶段不合理挂起: '+ev.type+' @ '+cs.stage);
      }
      results.push({event:ev,charId:cid,charName:tgt.charName,sr:sr,ok:false,reason:sr.reason});
      return;
    }
    applySettle(cs,sr,round);
    var tc=updateTags(cs,ev.type,pf,round);
    settledSet[cid]=true;
    var crossChanges=runCrossLinks(cid,ev.type,state,round,crosslinkUsed);
    saveCS(cid,cs);
    addLog(state,'settle',tgt.charName+'：'+(EVENT_LABEL[ev.type]||ev.type)+' '+(sr.finalD>=0?'+':'')+sr.finalD,{charId:cid,turn:round,detail:ev.evidence,devDetail:'base='+sr.base+',pf='+sr.pfMod+',tag='+sr.tagMod+',cal='+sr.calMod+',decay='+sr.rptDecay+',final='+sr.finalD});
    results.push({event:ev,charId:cid,charName:tgt.charName,sr:sr,tagChanges:tc,crossChanges:crossChanges,ok:true});
  });

  /* ── 所有 active 角色：标签衰减 + 关系动力 ── */
  activeList.forEach(function(cid){
    var cs=loadCS(cid);if(!cs)return;
    var pf=ensurePF(cid);var dy=ensureDY(cid);
    if(!settledSet[cid])cs.roundsIdle=(cs.roundsIdle||0)+1;
    naturalDecay(cs,round);
    runAutoDyn(cs,dy,round);
    checkPromptDyn(cs,dy,round);
    if(parsed.pressureReports&&parsed.pressureReports.length)processPR(parsed.pressureReports,cs,dy);
    saveDY(cid,dy);saveCS(cid,cs);
  });

  if(parsed.unresolved&&parsed.unresolved.length){
    parsed.unresolved.forEach(function(u){
      state.pending.push({target:u.target||'',type:u.type||'',evidence:u.evidence||'',reason:u.reason||'target_unknown',round:round,ts:now()});
    });
  }
  state.pending=state.pending.slice(-50);
  save(state);
  return{parsed:true,results:results,round:round,evCount:parsed.events.length};
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   prompt context 生成
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

function trackedIds(state){return safeArr(state&&state.roster&&state.roster.activeOrder).filter(Boolean)}

function focusCharIdOf(state,activeList){
  activeList=activeList&&activeList.length?activeList:trackedIds(state);
  if(!activeList.length)return'';
  var ui=state&&state.ui||{};
  var cid=trim(ui.focusCharId||state.roster&&state.roster.focusCharId||'');
  if(cid&&activeList.indexOf(cid)>=0)return cid;
  var present=safeArr(state&&state.scene&&state.scene.present);
  for(var i=0;i<present.length;i++){if(activeList.indexOf(present[i])>=0)return present[i]}
  return activeList[0]||'';
}

function mainCharIdOf(state,focusId,activeList){
  activeList=activeList&&activeList.length?activeList:trackedIds(state);
  var cid=trim(state&&state.roster&&state.roster.mainCharId||'');
  if(cid&&activeList.indexOf(cid)>=0)return cid;
  return focusId||activeList[0]||'';
}

function presentIdsOf(state,activeList,focusId){
  activeList=activeList&&activeList.length?activeList:trackedIds(state);
  var present=safeArr(state&&state.scene&&state.scene.present).filter(function(cid){return activeList.indexOf(cid)>=0});
  if(present.length)return present;
  if(focusId)return[focusId];
  return activeList.slice(0,1);
}

function topTagsForPrompt(cs,maxCount){
  maxCount=maxCount||4;
  var out=[];
  TAG_LIST.forEach(function(tn){
    var t=cs&&cs.tags&&cs.tags[tn];
    if(t&&Number(t.str||0)>0)out.push({name:tn,strength:Number(t.str||0),label:tagStrengthLabel(Number(t.str||0))});
  });
  out.sort(function(a,b){if(b.strength!==a.strength)return b.strength-a.strength;return a.name>b.name?1:-1});
  return out.slice(0,maxCount);
}

function promptDynamicsForChar(cs,pf,dy,round){
  var tm=tagStrMap(cs&&cs.tags||{});var out=[];dy=dy&&typeof dy==='object'?dy:{};dy.prompt=dy.prompt&&typeof dy.prompt==='object'?dy.prompt:{};
  PROMPT_DYNAMICS.forEach(function(d){
    if(!d.cond(tm))return;
    var ds=dy.prompt[d.id]||{};
    var lastHinted=Number(ds.lastHintedTurn||ds.lastRound||0)||0;
    var activeTurn=Number(ds.activeTurn||0)||0;
    if(lastHinted&&round-lastHinted<d.cd&&activeTurn!==round)return;
    out.push({id:d.id,label:d.label,hint:dynHint(d.id,pf&&pf.expressionStyle||'普通'),cooldown:d.cd});
  });
  return out;
}

function buildCharacterPromptState(state,cid,focusId,mainId,presentIds,round){
  var cs=loadCS(cid);if(!cs)return null;
  var pf=ensurePF(cid);var dy=ensureDY(cid);
  var inScene=presentIds.indexOf(cid)>=0;
  return{
    id:cid,
    name:cs.charName||cid,
    roleType:trim(state&&state.roster&&state.roster.characters&&state.roster.characters[cid]&&state.roster.characters[cid].role||'secondary')||'secondary',
    inScene:inScene,
    isFocus:cid===focusId,
    isMain:cid===mainId,
    value:Number(cs.value||0)||0,
    depth:Number(cs.depth||0)||0,
    stage:cs.stage||depthToStage(Number(cs.depth||0)||0),
    tendency:valueTendency(Number(cs.value||0)||0),
    topTags:topTagsForPrompt(cs,4),
   profileSummary:'',

    promptDynamics:promptDynamicsForChar(cs,pf,dy,round)
  };
}
function relationTargetListForPrompt(state){
  state=state||load();
  var active=safeArr(state.roster&&state.roster.activeOrder).map(trim).filter(Boolean).slice(0,5);
  var chars=state.roster&&state.roster.characters||{};

  return active.map(function(cid){
    var rc=chars[cid]||{};
    var cs=loadCS(cid)||{};
    var aliases=[]
      .concat(safeArr(rc.aliases))
      .concat(safeArr(cs.aliases))
      .map(trim)
      .filter(Boolean);

    var seen={};
    aliases=aliases.filter(function(a){
      var k=sig(a);
      if(!k||seen[k])return false;
      seen[k]=1;
      return true;
    }).slice(0,6);

    return{
      id:cid,
      name:cs.charName||rc.name||rc.displayName||cid,
      displayName:rc.displayName||rc.name||cs.charName||cid,
      aliases:aliases,
      role:rc.role||'secondary'
    };
  });
}

function buildRelCtxObject(state){
  state=state||load();

  var activeList=trackedIds(state).slice(0,5);
  var round=Number(state&&state.meta&&state.meta.round||0)||0;
  var focusId=focusCharIdOf(state,activeList);
  var mainId=mainCharIdOf(state,focusId,activeList);
  var presentIds=presentIdsOf(state,activeList,focusId);

  var characters=activeList
    .map(function(cid){
      return buildCharacterPromptState(state,cid,focusId,mainId,presentIds,round);
    })
    .filter(Boolean);

  var focus=null;
  var main=null;

  characters.forEach(function(ch){
    if(ch.isFocus)focus=ch;
    if(ch.isMain)main=ch;
  });

  var allowedTargets=relationTargetListForPrompt(state);

  var custom=trim(readCustomRules()||'');
  if(/^（在这里/.test(custom))custom='';

  return{
    targetPolicy:{
      maxTracked:5,
      mode:allowedTargets.length===0?'none':(allowedTargets.length===1?'single':'strict'),
      allowed:allowedTargets,
      instruction:allowedTargets.length
        ? '关系事件 target 必须从 allowed 名单中选择；不在名单内的角色不能产生关系变化。单角色时 target 固定写唯一绑定角色。'
        : '当前没有绑定可结算角色，events 必须为空。'
    },
    focus:focus,
    main:main,
    characters:characters,
    present:characters.filter(function(ch){
      return ch.inScene;
    }),
    offstage:characters.filter(function(ch){
      return !ch.inScene;
    }),
    scene:{
      present:presentIds,
      lastUpdatedTurn:Number(state&&state.scene&&state.scene.lastUpdatedTurn||0)||0
    },
    pending:safeArr(state&&state.pending).slice(-10),
    customRules:custom,
    flags:{
      enabled:!!(state&&state.settings&&state.settings.enabled!==false),
      autoSettle:!!(state&&state.settings&&state.settings.autoSettle!==false),
      cleanMachineBlock:!!(state&&state.settings&&state.settings.cleanMachineBlock!==false),
      maxTracked:Number(state&&state.settings&&state.settings.maxTracked||0)||0
    },
    promptDynamics:focus&&focus.promptDynamics?focus.promptDynamics:[],
    timestamp:{
      ts:now(),
      round:round
    }
  };
}


function buildRelLibObject(state){
  state=state||load();
  var stageGuides={};
  STAGES.forEach(function(stg){
    stageGuides[stg]=trim(readStageGuide(stg)||buildStageContent(stg)||'');
  });
  var custom=trim(readCustomRules()||'');
  if(/^（在这里/.test(custom))custom='';
  return{
    stageGuides:stageGuides,
    sceneHints:{
      focus:'焦点角色优先完整呈现。',
      present:'在场角色参与动态提示，不在场次要角色不注入。',
      offstage:'主要角色不在场时只保留一行摘要提示。'
    },
    systemRulesText:trim(readWBContent('rel_rules')||buildRulesContent()||''),
    customRulesText:custom,
    strengthLabels:{0:'无',1:'微弱',2:'轻',3:'明显',4:'强烈',5:'极端'}
  };
}

function buildCtxTextFallback(state,relCtx,relLib){
  relCtx=relCtx||buildRelCtxObject(state);
  relLib=relLib||buildRelLibObject(state);
  var focus=relCtx&&relCtx.focus;
  if(!focus)return'';
  var lines=['【关系系统】'];
  var tp=relCtx&&relCtx.targetPolicy||{};
  var allowed=safeArr(tp.allowed);

  if(allowed.length){
    lines.push('【关系结算目标锁定】');
    lines.push('只有以下已绑定角色可以产生关系变化：');
    allowed.forEach(function(t,i){
      var aliasText=safeArr(t.aliases).length?'（别名：'+safeArr(t.aliases).join('、')+'）':'';
      lines.push((i+1)+'. '+t.name+'，target 必须写：'+t.name+aliasText);
    });
    lines.push('如果事件影响的是玩家对当前角色的态度变化，target 仍然写被影响的已绑定角色名，不写玩家名。');
    lines.push('不在名单里的角色不要输出关系变化事件。');
  }else{
    lines.push('【关系结算目标锁定】当前没有绑定可结算角色，本轮 events 必须为空。');
  }

  if(focus.inScene!==false){
    lines.push('焦点角色：'+focus.name+'（ID：'+focus.id+'）');
    lines.push('阶段：'+focus.stage+' · '+focus.tendency);
    var fGuide=trim(relLib&&relLib.stageGuides&&relLib.stageGuides[focus.stage]||'');
    if(fGuide)lines.push('演绎边界：'+fGuide.replace(/【[^】]*】/g,'').trim());
    if(focus.topTags&&focus.topTags.length)lines.push('当前底色：'+focus.topTags.map(function(t){return t.name+'·'+(t.label||tagStrengthLabel(t.strength||0))}).join('，'));
    if(focus.profileSummary)lines.push('角色画像：'+focus.profileSummary);
    if(focus.promptDynamics&&focus.promptDynamics.length)lines.push('行为倾向：'+focus.promptDynamics.map(function(d){return d.label+(d.hint||'')}).join('；'));
  }else{
    lines.push('焦点角色：'+focus.name+'（当前不在场）');
  }
  var mainOffstage=relCtx.offstage.filter(function(ch){return ch.isMain&&!ch.isFocus})[0]||null;
  if(mainOffstage)lines.push('\n主要角色：'+mainOffstage.name+'（当前不在场）');
  relCtx.present.filter(function(ch){return !ch.isFocus}).forEach(function(ch){
    if(ch.isMain){
      lines.push('\n在场主要角色：'+ch.name+'（'+ch.stage+' · '+ch.tendency+'）');
      if(ch.profileSummary)lines.push('摘要：'+ch.profileSummary);
      else if(ch.topTags&&ch.topTags.length)lines.push('当前底色：'+ch.topTags.map(function(t){return t.name+'·'+(t.label||tagStrengthLabel(t.strength||0))}).join('，'));
      return;
    }
    lines.push('\n在场角色：'+ch.name+'（'+ch.stage+' · '+ch.tendency+'）');
    if(ch.topTags&&ch.topTags.length)lines.push('底色提示：'+ch.topTags.map(function(t){return t.name+'·'+(t.label||tagStrengthLabel(t.strength||0))}).join('，'));
  });
  if(relCtx.pending&&relCtx.pending.length)lines.push('\n当前待确认：'+relCtx.pending.length+' 条');
  if(relCtx.customRules)lines.push('\n【玩家自定义规则】\n'+relCtx.customRules);
  return lines.join('\n');
}

function syncPromptVars(state){
  state=state||load();
  var relCtx=buildRelCtxObject(state);
  var relLib=buildRelLibObject(state);
  var fallback=buildCtxTextFallback(state,relCtx,relLib);
  var relCtxText=JSON.stringify(relCtx||{});
  var relLibText=JSON.stringify(relLib||{});
  rawSet('rel_ctx',relCtxText,'chat');
  rawSet('rel_lib',relLibText,'chat');
  rawSet('rel_prompt_context',fallback,'chat');
  if(typeof TV.setvar==='function'){
    TV.setvar('rel_ctx',relCtxText);
    TV.setvar('rel_lib',relLibText);
    TV.setvar('rel_prompt_context',fallback);
  }
  return{rel_ctx:relCtx,rel_lib:relLib,rel_prompt_context:fallback};
}

function buildCtx(state){
  return buildCtxTextFallback(state);
}

function tagStrengthLabel(str){
  if(str>=5)return'极端';if(str>=4)return'强烈';if(str>=3)return'明显';if(str>=2)return'轻';if(str>=1)return'微弱';return'无';
}

function dynHint(did,expr){
  var H={
    trust_release:{'外显':'（角色可能会用行动展现信任——分享秘密、主动依赖、给予信物。）','普通':'（角色可能在某个时机自然地展现信任。）','内敛':'（角色可能用不起眼的小细节暗示信任——默默帮忙、不经意的放松。）'},
    jealousy_surface:{'外显':'（角色可能会直接表达不满或醋意。）','普通':'（角色可能会隐约流露嫉妒的情绪。）','内敛':'（角色可能只是沉默或眼神微变，但嫉妒在心里翻涌。）'},
    guilt_attempt:{'外显':'（角色可能会直接道歉或试图弥补。）','普通':'（角色可能在某个时刻流露出愧疚。）','内敛':'（角色可能不会说什么，但行为里带着补偿的痕迹。）'},
    distance_signal:{'外显':'（角色可能会直接拉开距离、回避互动。）','普通':'（角色可能在对话中显得有些疏离。）','内敛':'（角色可能只是回应变得简短，语气微妙地冷了一度。）'},
    dependency_show:{'外显':'（角色可能会主动寻求陪伴或帮助。）','普通':'（角色可能无意中表现出对玩家的依赖。）','内敛':'（角色可能表面独立，但眼神或停顿里藏着不想分开的意思。）'},
    compete_edge:{'外显':'（角色可能直接发起挑战或比较。）','普通':'（角色可能在某些事上表现出竞争意识。）','内敛':'（角色可能不说什么，但暗暗在意胜负。）'}
  };
  var h=H[did];if(!h)return'';
  return h[expr]||h['普通']||'';
}
function boundLorebookIdMap(){
  try{
    if(!(TV&&TV.chat&&TV.chat.current))return null;
    var chat=TV.chat.current();
    if(chat&&typeof chat.then==='function')return null;
    var raw=[]
      .concat(safeArr(chat&&chat.lorebooks))
      .concat(safeArr(chat&&chat.worldbooks))
      .concat(safeArr(chat&&chat.books))
      .concat(safeArr(chat&&chat.lorebookIds))
      .concat(safeArr(chat&&chat.worldbookIds))
      .concat(safeArr(chat&&chat.bookIds));
    if(!raw.length)return null;
    var map={};
    raw.forEach(function(x){
      var id=(x&&typeof x==='object')?(x.id!=null?x.id:(x.bookId!=null?x.bookId:(x.lorebookId!=null?x.lorebookId:(x.worldbookId!=null?x.worldbookId:'')))):x;
      if(id!=null&&id!=='')map[String(id)]=true;
    });
    return Object.keys(map).length?map:null;
  }catch(_){return null}
}

function textMentionsCharacter(text,charName,aliases){
  var base=sig(text||'');
  if(!base)return false;
  var keys=[charName].concat(safeArr(aliases)).map(function(x){return sig(x)}).filter(Boolean);
  for(var i=0;i<keys.length;i++){
    if(keys[i]&&base.indexOf(keys[i])>=0)return true;
  }
  return false;
}

async function collectProfileSourcesForCharacter(charId,charName,aliases,sourceConfig){
  var out=[],seen={};
  var sc=sourceConfig&&typeof sourceConfig==='object'?sourceConfig:{};
  var useCard=sc.useCharacterCard!==false;
  var useWB=sc.useWorldbookEntries!==false;
  var selectedBooks=safeArr(sc.selectedBookIds);
  var selectedEntries=safeArr(sc.selectedEntryKeys);
  var selectedBookMap={};selectedBooks.forEach(function(x){selectedBookMap[String(x)]=true});
  var selectedEntryMap={};selectedEntries.forEach(function(x){selectedEntryMap[String(x)]=true});
  var hasBookFilter=selectedBooks.length>0;
  var hasEntryFilter=selectedEntries.length>0;
  var hasAnySelection=hasBookFilter||hasEntryFilter;
  var boundMap=boundLorebookIdMap();

  function pushBlock(title,text){
    text=trim(text||'');
    if(!text)return;
    var key=hashSmall(title+'|'+sig(text));
    if(seen[key])return;
    seen[key]=true;
    out.push('【'+title+'】\n'+text);
  }

  try{
    if(useCard&&charId&&TV&&TV.character&&TV.character.get){
      var ch=await hostCall(function(){return TV.character.get(Number(charId))},'character.get.profile-source',12000,{silent:true,fallback:null});
      if(ch){
        pushBlock('角色卡描述',ch.description||'');
        pushBlock('角色卡人格',ch.personality||'');
        pushBlock('角色卡设定',ch.scenario||'');
        pushBlock('角色卡备注',ch.creator_notes||'');
        pushBlock('角色卡系统提示',ch.system_prompt||'');
      }
    }
  }catch(_){}

  try{
    if(useWB&&TV&&TV.lorebook&&TV.lorebook.all){
      var books=await hostCall(function(){return TV.lorebook.all()},'lorebook.all.profile-source',12000,{silent:true,fallback:[]});
      books=safeArr(books);
      for(var i=0;i<books.length;i++){
        var b=books[i];
        if(!b||b.id==null)continue;
        if(boundMap&&!boundMap[String(b.id)])continue;
        var full=b;
        try{
          if(!safeArr(full.entries).length&&TV.lorebook.get){
            full=await hostCall(function(){return TV.lorebook.get(b.id)},'lorebook.get.profile-source.'+b.id,12000,{silent:true,fallback:b});
          }
        }catch(_2){}
        safeArr(full&&full.entries).forEach(function(e){
          var ename=trim(e&&e.name||e&&e.identifier||'');
          var content=trim(e&&e.content||'');
          if(!content)return;
          var ekey=String(b.id)+'::'+ename;
          if(hasAnySelection&&!selectedBookMap[String(b.id)]&&!selectedEntryMap[ekey])return;
          pushBlock('世界书条目 '+ename,content);
        });
      }
    }
  }catch(_3){}

  return out.slice(0,12);
}

async function listProfileSources(charId){
  var cs=loadCS(charId);if(!cs)return{charCard:[],worldBook:[]};
  var charCard=[],worldBook=[];
  var boundMap=boundLorebookIdMap();
  try{
    if(charId&&TV&&TV.character&&TV.character.get){
      var ch=await hostCall(function(){return TV.character.get(Number(charId))},'character.get.list-sources',12000,{silent:true,fallback:null});
      if(ch){
        var fields=[['description','角色描述'],['personality','角色人格'],['scenario','角色设定'],['creator_notes','创建者备注'],['system_prompt','系统提示']];
        for(var fi=0;fi<fields.length;fi++){
          var f=fields[fi],txt=trim(ch[f[0]]||'');
          if(txt)charCard.push({field:f[0],label:f[1],preview:clip(txt,80),content:txt});
        }
      }
    }
  }catch(_){}
  try{
    if(TV&&TV.lorebook&&TV.lorebook.all){
      var books=await hostCall(function(){return TV.lorebook.all()},'lorebook.all.list-sources',12000,{silent:true,fallback:[]});
      books=safeArr(books);
      for(var i=0;i<books.length;i++){
        var b=books[i];if(!b||b.id==null)continue;
        if(boundMap&&!boundMap[String(b.id)])continue;
        var full=b;
        try{if(!safeArr(full.entries).length&&TV.lorebook.get){full=await hostCall(function(){return TV.lorebook.get(b.id)},'lorebook.get.list-sources.'+b.id,12000,{silent:true,fallback:b})}}catch(_2){}
        safeArr(full&&full.entries).forEach(function(e){
          var ename=trim(e&&e.name||e&&e.identifier||'');
          var content=trim(e&&e.content||'');
          if(!content)return;
          worldBook.push({bookId:b.id,bookName:trim(b.name||'世界书'),entryName:ename,preview:clip(content,80),content:content});
        });
      }
    }
  }catch(_3){}
  return{charCard:charCard,worldBook:worldBook};
}

function buildProfileDimensionPrompt(cs,sources){
  return [
    '你是角色画像维度分析器。',
    '请只根据提供的人设资料，输出一个 JSON 对象，不要解释，不要代码块。',
    '只允许以下字段：',
    'trustTendency, emotionSensitivity, conflictResilience, repairAcceptance, attachmentMode, expressionStyle',
    '',
    '各字段可选值必须严格从下面选择：',
    'trustTendency: 容易信任 / 普通 / 难以信任',
    'emotionSensitivity: 敏感 / 普通 / 迟钝',
    'conflictResilience: 坚韧 / 普通 / 脆弱',
    'repairAcceptance: 容易修复 / 普通 / 记仇',
    'attachmentMode: 容易依附 / 普通 / 独立',
    'expressionStyle: 外显 / 普通 / 内敛',
    '',
    '如果资料不足，就填“普通”。',
    '',
    '输出格式示例：',
    '{"trustTendency":"普通","emotionSensitivity":"敏感","conflictResilience":"坚韧","repairAcceptance":"普通","attachmentMode":"独立","expressionStyle":"内敛"}',
    '',
    '角色名：'+(cs&&cs.charName||'未命名角色'),
    '',
    '人设资料：',
    sources.join('\n\n')
  ].join('\n');
}

function parseProfileDimensionResult(text,pfOld){
  pfOld=pfOld||defProfile();
  var out=defProfile();
  PROFILE_DIMS.forEach(function(dim){
    out[dim]=pfOld[dim]||'普通';
  });

  text=trim(String(text||''));
  if(!text)return out;

  if(/^```/.test(text)){
    text=text.replace(/^```[a-zA-Z0-9_-]*\s*/,'').replace(/\s*```$/,'');
  }

  var start=text.indexOf('{');
  var end=text.lastIndexOf('}');
  if(start>=0&&end>start)text=text.slice(start,end+1);

  try{
    var obj=JSON.parse(text);
    PROFILE_DIMS.forEach(function(dim){
      var val=trim(obj&&obj[dim]||'');
      if(val&&PROFILE_RULES[dim]&&PROFILE_RULES[dim][val])out[dim]=val;
    });
  }catch(_){}

  return out;
}

function profileSummaryFromDims(pf){
  pf=pf||defProfile();
  var parts=[];
  if(pf.trustTendency==='难以信任')parts.push('防备心重');
  else if(pf.trustTendency==='容易信任')parts.push('更容易交付信任');

  if(pf.emotionSensitivity==='敏感')parts.push('情绪感受细');
  else if(pf.emotionSensitivity==='迟钝')parts.push('情绪反应偏慢');

  if(pf.conflictResilience==='坚韧')parts.push('遇到冲突不容易退');
  else if(pf.conflictResilience==='脆弱')parts.push('冲突里更容易受伤');

  if(pf.repairAcceptance==='记仇')parts.push('修复关系需要更长时间');
  else if(pf.repairAcceptance==='容易修复')parts.push('关系缓和相对更快');

  if(pf.attachmentMode==='容易依附')parts.push('更容易形成依附');
  else if(pf.attachmentMode==='独立')parts.push('会本能保留独立空间');

  if(pf.expressionStyle==='内敛')parts.push('表达偏克制');
  else if(pf.expressionStyle==='外显')parts.push('情绪和态度更愿意外露');

  if(!parts.length)return'画像资料不足，按通用规则判断。';
  return parts.join('，')+'。';
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   画像 API 生成
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

async function genProfileDimensions(cs,pf,sources){
  sources=safeArr(sources).map(trim).filter(Boolean);
  if(!sources.length)throw new Error('没有可用于画像生成的人设来源');

  var prompt=buildProfileDimensionPrompt(cs,sources);

  var txt='';

  if(TV&&typeof TV.generate==='function'){
    txt=await hostCall(function(){
      return TV.generate(prompt,{
        settings:{
          temperature:0.2,
          maxCompletionTokens:320
        }
      });
    },'generate.profile-dimensions',60000);
  }else{
    throw new Error('当前宿主不支持画像生成');
  }

  txt=trim(txt||'');
  if(!txt)throw new Error('画像生成没有返回内容');

  var parsed=parseProfileDimensionResult(txt,pf);

  return parsed;
}


async function genProfileSummary(cs,pf){
  return profileSummaryFromDims(pf||defProfile());
}

async function updateProfileSync(charId,sourceConfig){
  var cs=loadCS(charId);if(!cs)return false;
  var pf=ensurePF(charId);
  var aliases=safeArr(cs.aliases).map(trim).filter(Boolean).slice(0,10);
  var sc=sourceConfig&&typeof sourceConfig==='object'?sourceConfig:null;
  var sources=await collectProfileSourcesForCharacter(charId,cs.charName,aliases,sc);
  if(sc)pf.sourceConfig=sc;

  if(!sources.length){
    addCLog(cs,'api','画像生成失败：没有找到可用的人设来源');
    saveCS(charId,cs);
    return false;
  }

  var dims=await genProfileDimensions(cs,pf,sources);

  PROFILE_DIMS.forEach(function(dim){
    if(dims[dim]&&PROFILE_RULES[dim]&&PROFILE_RULES[dim][dims[dim]])pf[dim]=dims[dim];
  });

  pf.summary=profileSummaryFromDims(pf);
  pf.generatedAt=now();
  pf.source='api';
  savePF(charId,pf);

  try{
    await syncProfileWB(charId,cs.charName,pf.summary||'');
  }catch(e){
    addCLog(cs,'system','画像世界书同步失败: '+String(e&&e.message||e));
  }

  addCLog(cs,'api','角色画像维度已更新');
  saveCS(charId,cs);

  try{syncPromptVars(load())}catch(_){}
  return true;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   角色管理
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

function initChar(state,charId,charName,opts){
  opts=opts||{};
  var chars=state.roster&&state.roster.characters||{};
  if(chars[charId])return{ok:false,reason:'角色已追踪'};
  if(Object.keys(chars).length>=(state.settings.maxTracked||10))
    return{ok:false,reason:'已达追踪上限'};

  state.roster.characters[charId]={id:charId,name:charName,displayName:charName,aliases:[],role:opts.role||'secondary',status:'active'};
  if(state.roster.activeOrder.indexOf(charId)<0)state.roster.activeOrder.push(charId);
  if(opts.role==='main'&&!trim(state.roster.mainCharId||''))state.roster.mainCharId=charId;
  if(opts.role==='main'&&!trim(state.roster.focusCharId||''))state.roster.focusCharId=charId;
  state.scene=state.scene&&typeof state.scene==='object'?state.scene:{present:[],lastUpdatedTurn:0};
  if(opts.present===true&&state.scene.present.indexOf(charId)<0)state.scene.present.push(charId);
  rebuildAliasIndex(state);
  var cs=defCharState(charId,charName);
  cs.initAt=now();
  if(opts.aliases)cs.aliases=safeArr(opts.aliases).map(trim).filter(Boolean).slice(0,10);
  if(opts.value!=null)cs.value=boundedInt(opts.value,-100,100,0);
  if(opts.depth!=null){cs.depth=boundedInt(opts.depth,0,100,0);cs.stage=depthToStage(cs.depth)}
  addCLog(cs,'init','角色初始化: '+charName);
  saveCS(charId,cs);

  var pf=defProfile();
  if(opts.preset&&typeof opts.preset==='object'){
    PROFILE_DIMS.forEach(function(dim){
      if(opts.preset[dim]&&PROFILE_RULES[dim]&&PROFILE_RULES[dim][opts.preset[dim]])pf[dim]=opts.preset[dim];
    });
    pf.source='preset';
  }
  if(trim(opts.presetSummary||''))pf.summary=trim(opts.presetSummary||'');
  savePF(charId,pf);
  saveDY(charId,defDynamics(charId));
  try{syncProfileWB(charId,charName,'').catch(function(e){try{var s=load();addLog(s,'system','画像世界书同步失败: '+String(e&&e.message||e));save(s)}catch(_){}})}catch(_){}
  addLog(state,'init','新角色追踪：'+visibleNameOf(state,charId,charName),{charId:charId,charName:visibleNameOf(state,charId,charName)});
  save(state);
  try{syncPromptVars(state)}catch(_){}
  return{ok:true,charId:charId,charName:charName};
}

function removeChar(state,charId){
  var chars=state.roster&&state.roster.characters||{};
  if(!chars[charId])return false;
  var charName=visibleNameOf(state,charId,'');
  delete chars[charId];
  state.roster.activeOrder=(state.roster.activeOrder||[]).filter(function(c){return c!==charId});
  state.scene=state.scene&&typeof state.scene==='object'?state.scene:{present:[],lastUpdatedTurn:0};
  state.scene.present=safeArr(state.scene.present).filter(function(c){return c!==charId});
  if(trim(state.roster.mainCharId||'')===charId)state.roster.mainCharId=state.roster.activeOrder[0]||'';
  if(trim(state.roster.focusCharId||'')===charId)state.roster.focusCharId=state.roster.activeOrder[0]||'';
  rebuildAliasIndex(state);
  rawUnset(csKey(charId),'chat');rawUnset(pfKey(charId),'chat');rawUnset(dyKey(charId),'chat');
  addLog(state,'system','移除角色追踪：'+(charName||'该角色'),{charId:charId,charName:charName||''});
  save(state);
  try{syncPromptVars(state)}catch(_){}
  return true;
}
/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   自动绑定当前聊天主角色
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

async function bootstrapAutoTrackCurrentCharacter(force){
  var state=load();
  state.sync=state.sync&&typeof state.sync==='object'?state.sync:{};
  if(trim(state.sync.mainCharacterBoundId||''))return false;
  if(trim(state.roster&&state.roster.mainCharId||'')){
    state.sync.mainCharacterBoundId=trim(state.roster.mainCharId||'');
    state.sync.mainCharacterBoundName=visibleNameOf(state,state.sync.mainCharacterBoundId,'');
    save(state);
    return false;
  }
  var info=null;

  try{
    info=await getCurrentCharInfo();
  }catch(_){
    return false;
  }

  var charId=trim(info&&info.charId||'');
  var charName=trim(info&&info.charName||'');
  if(!charId||!charName)return false;

  var aliases=safeArr(info&&info.aliases).map(trim).filter(Boolean).slice(0,10);

  state.roster=state.roster&&typeof state.roster==='object'
    ? state.roster
    : {characters:{},activeOrder:[],mainCharId:'',focusCharId:''};

  state.roster.characters=state.roster.characters&&typeof state.roster.characters==='object'
    ? state.roster.characters
    : {};

  state.scene=state.scene&&typeof state.scene==='object'
    ? state.scene
    : {present:[],lastUpdatedTurn:0};

  state.ui=state.ui&&typeof state.ui==='object'
    ? state.ui
    : {};

  var existed=!!state.roster.characters[charId];

  if(!existed){
    var initRes=initChar(state,charId,charName,{
      role:'main',
      aliases:aliases,
      present:true,
      value:0,
      depth:0
    });
    if(!initRes||!initRes.ok)return false;

    state=load();
    state.roster=state.roster&&typeof state.roster==='object'
      ? state.roster
      : {characters:{},activeOrder:[],mainCharId:'',focusCharId:''};

    state.roster.characters=state.roster.characters&&typeof state.roster.characters==='object'
      ? state.roster.characters
      : {};

    state.scene=state.scene&&typeof state.scene==='object'
      ? state.scene
      : {present:[],lastUpdatedTurn:0};

    state.ui=state.ui&&typeof state.ui==='object'
      ? state.ui
      : {};
  }

  state.sync.mainCharacterBoundId=charId;
  state.sync.mainCharacterBoundName=visibleNameOf(state,charId,charName);
  addLog(state,'init','自动绑定当前聊天角色：'+visibleNameOf(state,charId,charName),{charId:charId,charName:visibleNameOf(state,charId,charName)});
  save(state);
  try{syncPromptVars(state)}catch(_){}
  return true;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   玩家修正（契约 §14）
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

function applyCorrection(charId,corr){
  var cs=loadCS(charId);if(!cs)return false;
  var rec={id:uid('corr'),ts:now(),type:corr.type||'manual',before:{},after:{},reason:trim(corr.reason||'')};

  if(corr.valueSet!=null){
    var nv=boundedInt(corr.valueSet,-100,100,0);
    rec.before.value=cs.value;
    rec.valueSet=nv;
    cs.value=nv;
    rec.after.value=cs.value;
  }
  if(corr.depthSet!=null){
    var nd=boundedInt(corr.depthSet,0,100,0);
    rec.before.depth=cs.depth;
    rec.depthSet=nd;
    cs.depth=nd;
    cs.stage=depthToStage(cs.depth);
    rec.after.depth=cs.depth;rec.after.stage=cs.stage;
  }
  if(corr.tagChanges&&typeof corr.tagChanges==='object'){
    rec.before.tags={};rec.after.tags={};
    Object.keys(corr.tagChanges).forEach(function(tn){
      if(TAG_LIST.indexOf(tn)<0)return;
      var tag=cs.tags[tn];if(!tag)return;
      var nv=boundedInt(corr.tagChanges[tn],0,5,tag.str);
      rec.before.tags[tn]=tag.str;tag.str=nv;rec.after.tags[tn]=nv;
    });
  }
  cs.corrections.push(rec);
  if(cs.corrections.length>100)cs.corrections=cs.corrections.slice(-80);
  addCLog(cs,'correction','玩家修正: '+(corr.reason||'手动调整'));
  saveCS(charId,cs);
  try{syncPromptVars(load())}catch(_){}
  return true;
}

function exportAll(state){
  var data={state:state,chars:{}};
  Object.keys(state.roster&&state.roster.characters||{}).forEach(function(cid){
    data.chars[cid]={state:loadCS(cid),profile:loadPF(cid),dynamics:loadDY(cid)};
  });
  return data;
}
function clearAll(state){
  Object.keys(state.roster&&state.roster.characters||{}).forEach(function(cid){
    rawUnset(csKey(cid),'chat');rawUnset(pfKey(cid),'chat');rawUnset(dyKey(cid),'chat');
  });
  var fresh=defState();fresh.chatId=state.chatId;
  rawSet(stKey(fresh.chatId),fresh,'chat');
  try{rawSet(legacyStKey(fresh.chatId),fresh,'chat')}catch(_){}
  addLog(fresh,'system','全部数据已清空');
  try{syncPromptVars(fresh)}catch(_){}
  return fresh;
}
