  '#'+ROOT_ID+' .rel-overlay.open{display:block!important}'+
  '#'+ROOT_ID+' .rel-overlay-mask{position:absolute!important;inset:0!important;background:rgba(10,16,30,.28)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(3px)!important}'+
  '#'+ROOT_ID+' .rel-overlay-panel{position:absolute!important;left:0!important;right:0!important;bottom:0!important;max-height:82%!important;background:#fff!important;border-radius:24px 24px 0 0!important;box-shadow:0 -12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.12)!important;display:flex!important;flex-direction:column!important;animation:relSheet .24s ease!important}'+
  '#'+ROOT_ID+' .rel-overlay-head{display:flex!important;align-items:flex-start!important;justify-content:space-between!important;gap:12px!important;padding:18px 20px 12px!important;border-bottom:1px solid #ECEEF2!important}'+
  '#'+ROOT_ID+' .rel-overlay-body{flex:1!important;overflow-y:auto!important;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch!important;padding:0 20px 20px!important}'+
  '#'+ROOT_ID+' .rel-overlay-title{font-size:18px!important;font-weight:900!important;line-height:1.3!important;color:#111318!important}'+
  '#'+ROOT_ID+' .rel-overlay-sub{font-size:12px!important;color:#8C95A6!important;margin-top:4px!important}'+
  '#'+ROOT_ID+' .rel-close-btn{width:32px!important;height:32px!important;border-radius:999px!important;border:1px solid #E6EAF0!important;background:#fff!important;display:grid!important;place-items:center!important;cursor:pointer!important;flex-shrink:0!important;color:#111318!important;font-size:14px!important;font-weight:900!important;font-family:inherit!important}'+
  '#'+ROOT_ID+' .rel-toast{position:absolute!important;left:50%!important;top:130px!important;transform:translateX(-50%) scale(.96)!important;padding:12px 16px!important;border-radius:16px!important;background:#F1ECFE!important;color:#5C38E2!important;font-size:12px!important;font-weight:850!important;opacity:0!important;pointer-events:none!important;transition:.18s ease!important;z-index:70!important;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(92,56,226,.12)!important;max-width:86%!important;text-align:center!important;border:1px solid #DDD6FE!important;white-space:nowrap!important}'+
  '#'+ROOT_ID+' .rel-toast.show{opacity:1!important;transform:translateX(-50%) scale(1)!important}'+
  '@keyframes relSheet{from{transform:translateY(16px);opacity:0}to{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}}'+
  '@media (max-width:430px){#'+ROOT_ID+' .rel-wrap{padding:0}#'+ROOT_ID+' .rel-device{width:100vw;height:100dvh;border-radius:0;box-shadow:none}#'+ROOT_ID+' .rel-device:before{display:none}}';
  (D.head||D.documentElement).appendChild(st);
}


function ensureRoot(){
  var r=D.getElementById(ROOT_ID);if(r)return r;
  r=D.createElement('div');r.id=ROOT_ID;
  r.innerHTML="<div class='rel-mask' data-base-close='1'></div><div class='rel-wrap'><div class='rel-device'><div class='rel-app' id='rel-app'></div><div class='rel-overlay' id='rel-overlay'></div><div class='rel-toast' id='rel-toast'></div></div></div>";
  D.body.appendChild(r);return r;
}

function ensurePanelAlive(){try{ensureStyle();ensureRoot();bindBase()}catch(e){console.warn('[关系面板]',e)}}

function relToast(t){
  var e=q('#rel-toast',ensureRoot());if(!e)return;
  var timerHost=(T&&T.setTimeout)?T:(typeof window!=='undefined'?window:null);
  try{if(app._toastTimer)(timerHost&&timerHost.clearTimeout?timerHost.clearTimeout:clearTimeout)(app._toastTimer)}catch(_){try{clearTimeout(app._toastTimer)}catch(_2){}}
  if(!t){
    e.classList.remove('show');e.textContent='';e.style.display='none';return;
  }
  e.style.display='block';
  e.textContent=t||'';
  e.classList.add('show');
  app._toastTimer=(timerHost&&timerHost.setTimeout?timerHost.setTimeout:setTimeout)(function(){
    try{e.classList.remove('show')}catch(_){}
    try{e.textContent=''}catch(_2){}
    try{e.style.display='none'}catch(_3){}
  },2200);
}

function openOverlay(title,sub,body){
  var o=q('#rel-overlay',ensureRoot());if(!o)return;
  o.innerHTML="<div class='rel-overlay-mask' data-overlay-close='1'></div><div class='rel-overlay-panel'><div class='rel-overlay-head'><div><div class='rel-overlay-title'>"+esc(title||'')+"</div><div class='rel-overlay-sub'>"+esc(sub||'')+"</div></div><button class='rel-close-btn' data-overlay-close='1'>×</button></div><div class='rel-overlay-body'>"+String(body||'')+"</div></div>";
  o.classList.add('open');
  try{if(app.ui&&app.ui.bindTextEditors)app.ui.bindTextEditors(o)}catch(_){}
}
function closeOverlay(){var o=q('#rel-overlay',ensureRoot());if(o)o.classList.remove('open')}

function openPanel(){
  ensurePanelAlive();app._relUserOpenedAt=now();
  var r=ensureRoot();r.classList.add('open');
  if(app.ui&&app.ui.ensureEntryPage){app.ui.ensureEntryPage();return}
  if(app.ui&&app.ui.renderAll)app.ui.renderAll(true);
}
function closePanel(){ensureRoot().classList.remove('open');closeOverlay();/* 叉=直接退出回聊天，不回总控 */}

var BASE_BIND_VER='20260609-relation-base';
function bindBase(){
  var r=ensureRoot();if(r.getAttribute('data-base-bound')===BASE_BIND_VER)return;r.setAttribute('data-base-bound',BASE_BIND_VER);r.removeAttribute('data-rel-base-bound');
  r.addEventListener('click',function(e){
    var n=e.target.closest?e.target.closest('[data-base-close],[data-overlay-close]'):null;
    if(!n)return;e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();
    if(n.hasAttribute('data-base-close'))closePanel();
    if(n.hasAttribute('data-overlay-close'))closeOverlay();
  },true);
}

app.base={
  version:VER,q:q,qa:qa,esc:esc,clip:clip,trim:trim,safeArr:safeArr,uid:uid,fmt:fmt,
  ensureRoot:ensureRoot,ensurePanelAlive:ensurePanelAlive,ensureStyle:ensureStyle,
  open:openPanel,close:closePanel,
  toast:relToast,openOverlay:openOverlay,closeOverlay:closeOverlay,
  bindBase:bindBase,
  isEditingNow:function(){var ae=null;try{ae=D.activeElement}catch(_){ae=null}var tag=ae&&ae.tagName?String(ae.tagName).toLowerCase():'';return!!(app._editing||app._editingUntil&&now()<app._editingUntil||tag==='input'||tag==='textarea'||tag==='select'||ae&&ae.isContentEditable)},
  renderAll:function(force){if(app.ui&&app.ui.renderAll)app.ui.renderAll(force)}
};

function revive(){ensurePanelAlive()}

function resetOpenStateOnBoot(){
  try{
    var r=ensureRoot();
    if(!app._relUserOpenedAt||now()-Number(app._relUserOpenedAt||0)>2000){
      r.classList.remove('open');
      closeOverlay();
    }
  }catch(_){}
}

function registerWithPlatform(){
  var p=platformApp();if(!p)return;
  p.plugins=p.plugins||{};
  p.plugins.relation={
    name:'关系系统',
    icon:'心',
    color:'#7C5CFC',
    version:VER,
    isActive:function(){var s=load();return trackedIds(s).length>0||!!app.core},
    getStats:function(){var s=load();return[{n:trackedIds(s).length,l:'角色'},{n:safeArr(s.pending).length,l:'压力'}]},
    open:openPanel,
    close:closePanel
  };
}

registerWithPlatform();
ensureStyle();
ensureRoot();
bindBase();
resetOpenStateOnBoot();
ensurePanelAlive();

Promise.resolve()
  .then(function(){return bootstrapAutoTrackCurrentCharacter(false)})
  .then(function(){
    try{return ensureWBEntries(load())}catch(_){return null}
  })
  .then(function(){
    try{syncPromptVars(load())}catch(_){}
    try{return refreshWBCache(load())}catch(_){return null}
  })
  .catch(function(){});



/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   AssistantPost 钩子 — 每轮自动结算
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

async function processAssistantPost(msg){
  var state=load();
try{
  await bootstrapAutoTrackCurrentCharacter(false);
  state=load();
}catch(_){}

  var text=messageContentOf(msg);
  if(!text)return;
  var mid=messageIdOf(msg);
  var key=mid||messageSig(text);
  var sigv=messageSig(text);
  state.turnState=state.turnState||{lastSummary:null,processedMessages:{},feedbackByMessage:{},feedbackByFloor:{},feedbackOrder:[],noChangeStreak:0,currentTurn:0};
  /* 如果已处理且不包含新机器块，跳过 */
  if(state.turnState.processedMessages[key]&&!extractBlock(text))return;
  if(state.turnState.processedMessages[key]===sigv)return;
  /* 未启用/无追踪角色时只做清理 */
  if(!state.settings.enabled||!state.settings.autoSettle){
    if(state.settings.cleanMachineBlock!==false)await cleanVisibleMachineBlock(msg,text,null);
    return;
  }
  if(!safeArr(state.roster&&state.roster.activeOrder).length){
    if(state.settings.cleanMachineBlock!==false)await cleanVisibleMachineBlock(msg,text,null);
    return;
  }
  /* ── 新顺序 ── */
  /* 步骤 1: 标记已处理 */
  state.turnState.processedMessages[key]=sigv;
  save(state);
  /* 步骤 2: 提取 + 解析 + 结算 */
  var result=processMessage(text,state);
  addLog(load(),'protocol',result&&result.parsed?
    '机器块解析成功: '+String(result.evCount||0)+' 条事件, round='+String(result.round||0):
    '本轮无机器块或解析失败');
  /* 步骤 3: 确定消息绑定（messageId + floorL） */
  var binding=await resolveMessageBinding(msg,result);
try{if(result){result.messageId=binding.messageId||mid||key;result.floorL=binding.floorL||0}}catch(_){}

  /* 步骤 4: 写入反馈到状态（强绑定 messageId + floorL） */
  var fresh=load();
  fresh.turnState=fresh.turnState||{lastSummary:null,processedMessages:{},feedbackByMessage:{},feedbackByFloor:{},feedbackOrder:[],noChangeStreak:0,currentTurn:0};
  fresh.turnState.processedMessages[key]=sigv;
  fresh.turnState.noChangeStreak=result&&result.parsed?0:boundedInt(Number(fresh.turnState.noChangeStreak||0)+1,0,999,0);
  rememberFeedback(fresh,binding.messageId||mid||key,binding.floorL,result);
  /* 步骤 5: 更新 prompt context */
  syncPromptVars(fresh);
  /* 步骤 6: 正文机器块清理（非核心，允许失败） */
  if(load().settings.cleanMachineBlock!==false){
    try{await cleanVisibleMachineBlock(msg,text,result)}catch(e){
      try{var ls=load();addLog(ls,'system','机器块清理失败(非致命): '+String(e&&e.message||e));save(ls)}catch(_){}
    }
  }
}

if(typeof TV!=='undefined'&&TV){
  if(!app._hookReg){
    app._hookReg=true;
    var origPost=TV.onAssistantMessagePost;
    TV.onAssistantMessagePost=function(msg){
      if(origPost)try{origPost(msg)}catch(_){}
      Promise.resolve().then(function(){return processAssistantPost(msg)}).catch(function(e){
        try{var s=load();addLog(s,'system','结算异常: '+String(e&&e.message||e));save(s)}catch(_){}
      });
    };
  }
}
async function pollRecentAssistantRelationBlocks(){
  if(app._relPostPollBusy)return;
  app._relPostPollBusy=true;

  try{
    if(!TV||!TV.message||!TV.message.count||!TV.message.find)return;

    var st=load();
    if(!st.settings||st.settings.enabled===false||st.settings.autoSettle===false)return;

    var total=await hostCall(function(){
      return TV.message.count();
    },'message.count.relation.poll',6000,{silent:true,fallback:0});

    total=Number(total||0)||0;
    if(!total)return;

    var from=Math.max(0,total-8);

    var arr=await hostCall(function(){
      return TV.message.find([from,total-1],{role:'assistant'});
    },'message.find.relation.poll',10000,{silent:true,fallback:[]});

    arr=safeArr(arr);

    for(var i=0;i<arr.length;i++){
      var msg=arr[i];
      var text=messageContentOf(msg);
      if(!extractBlock(text))continue;

      await processAssistantPost(msg);
    }
  }catch(e){
    try{
      var s=load();
      addLog(s,'system','关系轮询结算异常: '+String(e&&e.message||e));
      save(s);
    }catch(_){}
  }finally{
    app._relPostPollBusy=false;
  }
}

function startAssistantPostPoller(){
  try{
    if(app._relPostPollTimer)clearInterval(app._relPostPollTimer);
  }catch(_){}

  app._relPostPollTimer=setInterval(function(){
    pollRecentAssistantRelationBlocks();
  },8000);

  setTimeout(function(){
    pollRecentAssistantRelationBlocks();
  },900);
}

startAssistantPostPoller();

}catch(e){
  try{console.error('[关系核心] 初始化失败:',e)}catch(_){}
}
})();

</script>

entries.name: 关系界面
entries.replaceString:
<script>
(function(){
try{

var T;
try{T=window.top||window}catch(_){T=window}
var D=T.document||document;

var NS='__FIFTH_SEASON_RELATION__';
var app=T[NS]=T[NS]||{};
var VER='第五季果汁';
var ROOT_ID='fifth-season-relation-root';
var PAGE_STYLE_ID='fifth-season-relation-ui-style';

app.uiShell={version:VER};

function core(){return app.core||{}}
function base(){return app.base||{}}
function q(s,r){try{return(r||D).querySelector(s)}catch(_){return null}}
function qa(s,r){try{return Array.prototype.slice.call((r||D).querySelectorAll(s))}catch(_){return[]}}
function esc(s){return core().esc?core().esc(s):String(s==null?'':s).replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"')}
function trim(s){return String(s==null?'':s).trim()}
function clip(s,n){return core().clip?core().clip(s,n):trim(s).slice(0,n||120)}
function fmt(t){return core().fmt?core().fmt(t):'--'}
function safeArr(a){return Array.isArray(a)?a:[]}
function now(){return Date.now()}
function toast(t){if(base().toast)base().toast(t);else console.log('[关系系统]',t)}
function uiRoot(){return base().ensureRoot?base().ensureRoot():q('#'+ROOT_ID)}
function syncPromptVarsSafe(state){try{if(core().syncPromptVars)core().syncPromptVars(state||loadState())}catch(_){}}

var _actBusy=false;
var _actBusyAt=0;
var _actBusyAction='';

function ensurePageStyle(){
  var old=D.getElementById(PAGE_STYLE_ID);if(old)old.remove();
  var st=D.createElement('style');st.id=PAGE_STYLE_ID;
  var R='#'+ROOT_ID;
  st.textContent=`
${R} *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
${R} .rel-page{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#F4F5F7;color:#111318;overflow:hidden;font-family:'DM Sans',-apple-system,'PingFang SC','Noto Sans SC','Microsoft YaHei',sans-serif}
${R} .rel-scroll,${R} .rel-main{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;overscroll-behavior:contain;min-height:0}
${R} .rel-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar,${R} .rel-main::-webkit-scrollbar,${R} .rel-char-strip::-webkit-scrollbar{width:0;height:0}
${R} .rel-main{padding:14px 16px 28px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#F7F8FB 0%,#F3F1FA 100%)}
${R} .rel-header{padding:88px 20px 0;background:rgba(244,245,247,.95);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);z-index:10;flex:none}
${R} .rel-header-top{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:12px 0 10px;gap:10px}
${R} .rel-brand{font-size:11px;font-weight:900;color:#5C38E2}
${R} .rel-header-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center}
${R} .rel-icon-btn{height:40px;min-width:40px;padding:0 12px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #E6EAF0;background:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:4px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:850;color:#111318;font-family:inherit;position:relative}
${R} .rel-icon-btn:hover,${R} .rel-back-btn:hover,${R} .rel-close-btn:hover{border-color:#DDD6FE;color:#5C38E2}
${R} .rel-badge{position:absolute;top:-5px;right:-5px;min-width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:9px;background:#5C38E2;color:#fff;font-size:10px;font-weight:900;display:grid;place-items:center;padding:0 4px;line-height:1;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(92,56,226,.35)}
${R} .rel-char-switcher{position:relative;flex:none}
${R} .rel-char-trigger{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;height:40px;padding:0 12px 0 5px;border:1.5px solid #ECEEF2;border-radius:20px;background:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .15s;white-space:nowrap}
${R} .rel-char-trigger:hover{border-color:#DDD6FE}
${R} .rel-char-trigger.open{border-color:#5C38E2;background:#F1ECFE}
${R} .rel-char-trigger .avatar,${R} .rel-char-option .avatar{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:900;flex:none}
${R} .rel-char-trigger .avatar{background:#5C38E2;color:#fff}
${R} .rel-char-trigger .trigger-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:850;color:#111318}
${R} .rel-char-trigger .trigger-arrow{font-size:8px;color:#8C95A6;margin-left:1px;transition:transform .2s}
${R} .rel-char-trigger.open .trigger-arrow{transform:rotate(180deg)}
${R} .rel-char-dropdown{display:none;position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 4px);left:0;min-width:140px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #ECEEF2;border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(30,42,68,.12),0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,.03);z-index:100;padding:4px}
${R} .rel-char-dropdown.show{display:block}
${R} .rel-char-option{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;padding:7px 10px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:transparent;width:100%;font-family:inherit;transition:background .1s;text-align:left}
${R} .rel-char-option:hover{background:#F5F6F9}
${R} .rel-char-option.on{background:#F1ECFE}
${R} .rel-char-option .avatar{background:#F1ECFE;color:#5C38E2}
${R} .rel-char-option.on .avatar{background:#5C38E2;color:#fff}
${R} .rel-char-option .opt-info{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start}
${R} .rel-char-option .opt-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:850;color:#111318;line-height:1.2}
${R} .rel-char-option .opt-sub{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#8C95A6;line-height:1.2}
${R} .rel-head{padding:88px 16px 0;background:rgba(244,245,247,.95);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);z-index:10;flex:none}
${R} .rel-head-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;height:50px;gap:10px}
${R} .rel-head-title{font-size:17px;font-weight:950;color:#111318;flex:1;min-width:0;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
${R} .rel-back-btn,${R} .rel-close-btn{height:40px;min-width:40px;padding:0 12px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #E6EAF0;background:#fff;display:grid;place-items:center;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;font-weight:850;color:#111318;font-family:inherit}
${R} .rel-close-btn{color:#8C95A6;flex:none}
${R} .rel-tabs{display:flex;gap:0;flex:none;background:rgba(244,245,247,.95);padding:0 16px}
${R} .rel-tab{flex:1;appearance:none;border:0;background:transparent;padding:11px 0 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:900;color:#8C95A6;cursor:pointer;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;font-family:inherit}
${R} .rel-tab.on{color:#111318;border-color:#5C38E2}
${R} .rel-hero{margin:8px 16px 0;background:linear-gradient(145deg,#3D1FA8 0%,#5C38E2 50%,#7048E8 100%);border-radius:26px;padding:24px 22px 22px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;color:#fff;box-shadow:0 16px 36px rgba(92,56,226,.22)}
${R} .rel-hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-50px;right:-30px;width:180px;height:180px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05)}
${R} .rel-hero::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:-40px;left:-20px;width:120px;height:120px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
${R} .hero-top{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;position:relative;z-index:2}
${R} .hero-chip,${R} .rel-live-chip{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;height:24px;padding:0 10px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.16);font-size:10px;font-weight:850}
${R} .hero-chip .dot,${R} .rel-live-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:#4ADE80;box-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(74,222,128,.55)}
${R} .hero-char-name{font-size:32px;font-weight:950;line-height:1.15;margin-top:16px;position:relative;z-index:2;letter-spacing:-.02em}
${R} .hero-stage-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-top:10px;position:relative;z-index:2}
${R} .hero-stage-label{font-size:13px;font-weight:760;opacity:.85}
${R} .hero-stage-bar{display:flex;gap:3px;flex:1}
${R} .hero-stage-seg{flex:1;height:4px;border-radius:2px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);transition:background .3s}
${R} .hero-stage-seg.filled{background:rgba(255,255,255,.7)}
${R} .hero-stage-seg.current{background:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(255,255,255,.4)}
${R} .hero-metrics{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:16px;position:relative;z-index:2}

${R} .hero-nav{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:6px;margin-top:14px;position:relative;z-index:2}

${R} .hero-nav-dot.active{width:18px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.8)}
